::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{%
  >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{1.5in}
  >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{1.5in}
  >{\centering\arraybackslash}p{1.5in}%
}
\toprule
\textbf{A--} [90\%, 93\%) & \multicolumn{2}{c}{\cellcolor{lightgray} \textbf{A} [93\%, 100\%]} \\
\midrule
\textbf{B--} [80\%, 83\%) & \textbf{B} [83\%, 87\%) & \textbf{B+} [87\%, 90\%) \\
\midrule
\textbf{C--} [70\%, 73\%) & \textbf{C} [73\%, 77\%) & \textbf{C+} [77\%, 80\%) \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{2}{c}{\cellcolor{lightgray} \textbf{D} [60\%, 67\%)} & \textbf{D+} [67\%, 70\%) \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{3}{c}{\cellcolor{lightgray} \textbf{F} [0, 59\%)} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<table class="grade-table" aria-label="Grade conversion table">
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="grade-other">A–<br><span class="range">[90%, 93%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-A" colspan="2">A<br><span class="range">[93%, 100%]</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="grade-other">B–<br><span class="range">[80%, 83%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-other">B<br><span class="range">[83%, 87%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-other">B+<br><span class="range">[87%, 90%)</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="grade-other">C–<br><span class="range">[70%, 73%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-other">C<br><span class="range">[73%, 77%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-other">C+<br><span class="range">[77%, 80%)</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="grade-D" colspan="2">D<br><span class="range">[60%, 67%)</span></td>
      <td class="grade-other">D+<br><span class="range">[67%, 70%)</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="grade-F" colspan="3">F<br><span class="range">[0%, 59%]</span></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<style>
.grade-table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 1em 0;
}
.grade-table td {
  border: 1px solid;
  padding: 0.35em 1em;
  text-align: center;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.range {
  font-size: 0.85em;
  font-weight: normal;
  display: block;
}
.grade-A { background-color: var(--span-bg-blue); }
.grade-D { background-color: var(--span-bg-yellow); }
.grade-F { background-color: var(--span-bg-red); }
.grade-other { background-color: var(--span-bg-gray); }
</style>
:::
